subjects.description: A stressed stickman office worker with disheveled hair and a worried facial expression.
subjects.action: Looking at a phone screen showing a zero balance with big red circles.

image_prompt.environment: Minimalist office desk with scattered papers and a sad-looking piggy bank.
image_prompt.lighting: Dim grey lighting with stark red accents on the digital number.
image_prompt.composition: Close-up shot on the character's frustrated face.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: ¿Sientes que trabajas todo el mes pero tu cuenta bancaria sigue totalmente en cero?

subjects.description: The same stickman character looking at a pile of unpaid bills.
subjects.action: Rubbing his temples in confusion and overwhelm.

image_prompt.environment: A messy room filled with floating invoice papers.
image_prompt.lighting: Cold blue light emphasizing a chaotic atmosphere.
image_prompt.composition: Medium shot showing the character surrounded by papers.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Es el error más común: gastar todo lo que sobra sin un plan.
